title: Figure 2 in Escherichia coli expression and characterization of -amylase from Geobacillus thermodenitrificans DSM-465
author: Al-Amri, A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Enzyme kinetics. (A) The effect of temperature on the enzyme stability; (B) determination of KM and Vmax values of purified alpha-amylase using Lineweaver-Burk plot; (C) The effect of reaction mixture temperature on the enzyme activity indicating an optimum temperature of 70°C; (D) The effect of pH on the enzyme activity, showing maximum activity at pH 8.
steps_raw: Figure 2. Enzyme kinetics. (A) The effect of temperature on the enzyme stability; (B) determination of KM and Vmax values of purified alpha-amylase using Lineweaver-Burk plot; (C) The effect of reaction mixture temperature on the enzyme activity indicating an optimum temperature of 70°C; (D) The effect of pH on the enzyme activity, showing maximum activity at pH 8.
